name: profile-suggest flags a financial-vocabulary signal when README contains finance terms (PCI, ledger, transaction)
command: mkdir -p repo && printf '# Project\nWe handle PCI ledger transactions for clients.\n' > repo/README.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/profile-suggest/scan.sh" --root repo 2>out.txt && grep -q 'financial_vocab=detected' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
